case_title: TENGIZ IOSEBSHVILI VS. ROBERT A. LEHR

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-24-2012 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO JAN-30-2013 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY.
